channel.title: Audio on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Audio on jamesm.blog

item.title: The SID Chip: Engineering the Most Iconic Sound in Computing History
item.description: The SID chip gave the Commodore 64 the ability to synthesize complex sound in real-time. But why did it sound so distinctive? And why has no other chip in computing history achieved the same cultural impact?
